title: How Police Captured Colorado's Smartest Killer

beats.description: Cold open showing the mother discovering Crystal's body and Daniel leaving for work, establishing the killer's calculated escape.
Introduction to the couple, the initial garage break-in, and early police response to stalking reports.
Stalking intensifies with messages from 'Anthony', Crystal hires a PI, involves police, and receives a fake message creating false relief.
Marital strain is revealed, Daniel's initial interview explores family dynamics, and the investigation broadens.
The murder occurs, 911 call is made, police discover the body, and grieving family members arrive at the scene.
Security cameras were disabled, ex-girlfriend Carrie's testimony reveals a matching pattern, and Daniel officially becomes a suspect.
Anthony's alibi is confirmed, digital evidence traces back to Daniel's workplace IP, and the second interrogation begins.
Daniel's interrogation breakdown, arrest execution, final forensic evidence summary, and case resolution.
